sequences.transitionIn: The player finishes a situated task before the visitor signal interrupts it.
sequences.transitionOut: The introduced visitor is oriented in the room and creates the next local objective.
sequences.nextDramaticQuestion: Why did the visitor know the house before entering?

phases.physicalAction: The player completes the current household task.
A bell rings at the closed front door.
The player walks to the entrance.
The player opens the door and the visitor crosses the threshold.
The player leads the visitor to the assigned room.
The visitor takes position beside the next objective.
phases.dialogueIntent: Create a concrete question rather than a riddle.
